theme_details.description: Agriculture Inventory ERP targeting enterprise farm managers and retailers. Earthy, professional, and trustworthy.

typography.installation: Add Google Fonts links for Poppins and DM Sans in index.html

button.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#15803D] to-[#65A30D] text-white rounded-xl px-6 py-2.5 font-medium shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(21,128,61,0.25)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(21,128,61,0.35)] transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
button.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 transition-all active:scale-95
button.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-primary hover:bg-green-50 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 transition-colors

input.base: w-full bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-slate-900 placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#65A30D]/20 focus:border-[#65A30D] transition-all
input.label: block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1.5

table.container: w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white
table.header: bg-slate-50 text-slate-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold border-b border-slate-200
table.action_cell: flex items-center gap-2 justify-end opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity

sidebar.container: w-[280px] bg-[#0F3D1F] h-screen fixed top-0 left-0 flex flex-col text-white z-40
sidebar.logo_area: h-20 flex items-center px-6 border-b border-white/10
sidebar.nav_link: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 mx-4 my-1 rounded-xl text-white/70 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white transition-all font-medium text-sm
sidebar.nav_link_active: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 mx-4 my-1 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-r from-[#15803D] to-[#65A30D] text-white shadow-lg font-medium text-sm

login.left_panel: Relative container with hero image covering 100% height. Heavy gradient overlay `#0F3D1F` from bottom. Content: Branding, Tagline ('Smart Inventory. Better Farming. Stronger Future.'), and 3 Glassmorphism Feature Cards stacked with stagger animations.
login.right_panel: Background `#F8FAFC`. Centered Glassmorphism Login Card (max-w-md, rounded-3xl, shadow-2xl). Form: Username, Password, Remember Me, Forgot Password, Login Button, Google OAuth Button.
login.effects: Floating leaf animations on the left panel using Framer Motion.

dashboard.structure: Sidebar + Main Content area. Main content has top nav (sticky) and scrollable body. Background `#F8FAFC`.
dashboard.top_nav: Sticky header, blurred background, Search bar, Notifications icon, Profile dropdown.
dashboard.kpi_grid: Grid of 4 Stat Cards (Total Products, Today's Sales, Today's Purchases, Low Stock). Use 'Tetris' grid logic. Each card has an icon with a soft green background.
dashboard.charts_area: Main Area Chart spanning 2 columns, Top Selling list in 1 column.
dashboard.tables_area: Recent Sales & Purchases side-by-side or stacked.

forms_invoicing.structure: Two-column or multi-section layout for Purchase/Sales Entry. Container max-width: xl.
forms_invoicing.header_section: Supplier/Customer selection, Date, Invoice No. (Grid 3 cols).
forms_invoicing.line_items: Full-width complex table. Columns: Product (Dropdown), Batch, Expiry, Qty, Unit Price, Tax, Total, Action (Remove). Below table: '+ Add Product' dashed button.
forms_invoicing.summary_section: Right-aligned panel showing Subtotal, Tax Calculation, Discount, and Grand Total. Prominent 'Save & Issue' primary button.

motion.floating_leaves: Use Framer Motion to animate SVG leaves. randomize initial y, x, rotation. animate y: ['-10%', '110%'], rotate: [0, 360], x: slightly oscillating. Repeat infinity, duration 10-20s.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on #15803D passes AA standards (it does, ratio is high). Form inputs must have visible focus rings (#65A30D/20).
accessibility.aria: Use aria-labels for icon-only buttons (e.g., trash icon in line items). Use role='region' for main sections.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='login-submit-button'`, `data-testid='add-line-item'`).
accessibility.empty_transparent: Never use fully transparent backgrounds on dropdowns or sticky headers. Always apply background color with blur.

hero_login.description: Sunrise corn field landscape for left split-screen

decorations.description: Use Lucide React 'Leaf' icon or custom SVG paths for floating leaf particles. Color them in lime and deep green with variable opacity (10%-40%).

3d_libraries.charts: recharts (Use AreaChart for Sales Overview, BarChart for Monthly comparisons. Apply custom tooltip with rounded corners and chart color palette.)
3d_libraries.motion: framer-motion (For route transitions, micro-interactions, and floating leaf hero effect.)
3d_libraries.icons: lucide-react (Consistent, clean stroke icons mapping well to enterprise SaaS.)

empty_state.container: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12 text-center bg-slate-50/50 rounded-2xl border border-dashed border-slate-200
empty_state.heading: text-lg font-medium text-slate-800 mb-2 font-poppins
empty_state.action: Render primary button to add new record.

error_state.container: p-4 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-xl flex items-start gap-3

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Adhere to the provided Tailwind CSS variables and styling classes.
Use `.js` and `.jsx` extensions. Do NOT use TypeScript (`.tsx`, `.ts`).
Do NOT use Inter for any typography. Implement Google Fonts: Poppins (Headings) and DM Sans (Body). Apply `font-poppins` and `font-dmsans` correctly in tailwind config.
Implement the floating leaf effect on the login page using Framer Motion.
Make sure Cards have `rounded-[24px]` and the specific soft shadow provided in the specs.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes as specified.
Avoid fully transparent backgrounds on overlays (modals, dropdowns) - always use a solid color or backdrop-blur.
For tables, follow the specific padding and border-bottom styling to keep it clean and readable.
Never center text universally; align left for paragraphs/tables and center only for hero text or empty states.
Use Lucide-React for all icons, maintaining a consistent stroke width.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Implement the custom shadows, large border radii, and gradient buttons perfectly.
DO NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all` on body). Attach transitions to specific classes (e.g., buttons, inputs).
DO NOT center align the app container. No `.App { text-align: center; }`.
NEVER use placeholder URLs (via.placeholder.com). Use the URLs provided in the `media` section.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, focus rings, scale on active). Static = dead.
Use generous spacing (Tailwind p-6, p-8) for cards. Cramped designs look cheap.
